mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (member_id, title, content, category, status, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, title, content, category, status, answer, answered_at, created_at FROM post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, member_id, title, content, category, status, answer, answered_at, created_at FROM post ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET answer = #{answer}, status = 'ANSWERED', answered_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
